global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with product images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with discounts on bestsellers.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: A simple logo text 'VantaStyle' displayed prominently at the top in a clean font.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Three rectangular product images arranged in a row, each with a glossy finish.

elements.label: Additional product image
elements.description: An additional rectangular product image with a glossy finish, positioned slightly to the right.

elements.label: Additional product image
elements.description: A smaller rectangular product image with a glossy finish, positioned to the left.

elements.label: Additional product image
elements.description: Another rectangular product image with a glossy finish, positioned to the right.

elements.label: Discount headline
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now' in a prominent position.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Book now' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom.

elements.label: Price text
elements.description: Text displaying the price '€29.99' in a clear and readable font, positioned above the CTA.
